title: bupleurum commutatum
intro: Bupleurum commutatum, also known as Yellow Flag or Bupleurum, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean and parts of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial actions. The health benefits of Bupleurum commutatum include reducing fever, alleviating joint pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. Bupleurum commutatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory infections, flu, and other conditions.
